evals.prompt: Run the daily CI triage on this repository
evals.expected_output: Triage report in learnings/ with CI status, open issues, and categorized findings

evals.prompt: A CI failure was found that needs human architecture decision. Handle it.
evals.expected_output: Item routed to inbox/ for human review, not dispatched to sub-agent
assertions: File is created under inbox/ directory
Inbox file contains context about why it can't be automated
STATE.md is updated with inbox item
